name: IPPBX
message: IPPBX - the company is a developer of program solutions, cloud platforms, virtualization systems and so on, offering its services to small and medium -sized businesses. Ippbx corporate office is located in 3500 S Dupont Hwy, Dover, Delaware, 19901, United States and has 57 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 903.5 MB
